name: clusterra-init
info:
Bootstrap palette installer.

Fetches `GET /v1/templates` and `GET /v1/api-routes`, renders one subflow per non-interactive ready template (`clusterra-launch-{id}`) and per API route (`clusterra-{name}`), and POSTs them to Node-RED's own admin API so they appear as palette nodes immediately — no manual import.

Preset rows (parent_id != "") render a launch subflow whose env defaults are drawn from the preset's static_values + schema_values but whose submit targets the parent's template_id, mirroring what the console does.

Idempotent: a content hash is stored in global context; the function exits early on subsequent runs unless the catalog changed.

name: fetch + install
